sentences: You probably built something on a free AI model this year.
The company that gave it to you banned its own competitors from using it.
They say they are democratizing intelligence for everyone.
You cannot easily regulate the open source community.
That is why Meta wrapped a corporate product in that flag.
The license blocks Google and ByteDance by name.
But it recruits you as an unwitting regulatory shield.
Regulators want to crack down on a trillion-dollar corporation.
They cannot touch a global community of innovators.
The generosity is not for your power.
Zuckerberg opened the gates so the crowd would stand between him and the law.
background_prompt: A breathtaking, serene cinematic aerial shot of a winding turquoise glacial river flowing through a lush, deep green valley in the Swiss Alps at sunrise. Soft, ethereal morning mist clings to the pine trees. In the distance, jagged snow-capped peaks are bathed in warm, golden light against a clear pale blue sky. 9:16 portrait orientation, photorealistic, 8k resolution, ultra-wide angle, stunning natural beauty.
